body: which changes when the fluxes are applied to the tendencies (right before the time stepping rather than "leapfrogging" to the next time stepping)

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: Using the new Oceananigans

body:
It is already taken care of in Oceananigans here
https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/blob/e166aacf44a2dfb8ba48aa4b4ba7c42fe08170c4/src/Models/HydrostaticFreeSurfaceModels/hydrostatic_free_surface_model.jl#L27-L33

Closes #592
title: Remove `vertical_coordinate` kwarg from `ocean_simulation`

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Thermodynamics` package from `0.12` to `0.12, 0.13`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Thermodynamics to 0.13, (keep existing compat)
